name: Mandarin Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Instant chicken broth and seasoning mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the chicken in butter and set aside.
2. In the same skillet, cook the mushrooms over high heat until liquid evaporates, about 1-2 minutes.
3. Remove from heat. Sprinkle mushrooms with flour and stir-fry quickly to combine.
4. Gradually stir in water. Add orange juice concentrate and dry seasoning mix.
5. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
6. Reduce heat, add chicken back into the skillet, and simmer for about 3 minutes.
7. Add mandarin orange segments and sprinkle with green onions.
8. Serve over a bed of rice.
